Cryptographically verify a Truestamp proof bundle JSON file.

Verifies the complete chain: signing keys, proof signature, item hashes,
Ed25519 signatures, Merkle proofs, block chain integrity, and public
blockchain commitments (Stellar, Bitcoin).

Proof input can be provided as:
  truestamp verify proof.json           Local file path
  truestamp verify https://host/p.json  URL (auto-detected)
  truestamp verify --file proof.json    Explicit file path
  truestamp verify --file               Interactive file picker
  truestamp verify --url https://...    Explicit URL download
  truestamp verify --url                Interactive URL prompt
  cat proof.json | truestamp verify     Pipe from stdin

Use --remote to delegate verification to the Truestamp server API instead
of performing local computation. Requires --api-key to be set.

Exit code 0 on success, 1 on verification failure.

Usage:
  truestamp verify [file-or-url] [flags]

Flags:
      --file string[="(pick)"]    Path to proof file (interactive picker if no path given)
      --hash string               Expected claims hash (hex) to compare against proof
  -h, --help                      help for verify
      --json                      Output results as JSON
      --remote                    Verify via server API instead of local computation (requires --api-key)
  -s, --silent                    No output, exit code only
      --skip-external             Skip all external API verification
      --skip-signatures           Skip signing key and signature verification
      --url string[="(prompt)"]   URL to download proof from (interactive prompt if no URL given)

Global Flags:
      --api-key string        API key for authenticating with the Truestamp API
      --api-url string        Base URL of the Truestamp API
      --config string         Path to config file (default: <home>/config.toml)
      --http-timeout string   HTTP timeout for external API calls (e.g. 10s, 30s, 1m)
      --keyring-url string    URL of the Truestamp keyring endpoint
      --no-color              Disable color output
      --no-upgrade-check      Disable the once-per-day 'new version available' notice
      --team string           Team ID for multi-tenant API operations
